title: Fabricae Ex Nihilo - AE2 Addon
description: This is an addon for FabricaeExNihilo to add Support for Applied Energiestics 2
body:
This is an addon for [FabricaeExNihilo](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricae-ex-nihilo) to add Support for Applied Energiestics 2

----

Start by sieving Dust to get Skystone Dust. Use a barrel and lava to turn the dust into Skystone Blocks, which can be hammered and sieved again to obtain Certus Quartz
